filesModified.purpose: Fixed fixed-header width constraint (left-0/right-0 → left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-(--max-container)) and z-index (z-150 → z-200) on the header-main div for both desktop and mobile fixed-scroll variants
Mirrored the same fixed-header width and z-index changes in the editor TSX to keep TSX/PHP in sync

Changed dropdown gap from md:mt-4 to md:mt-6 (24px gap between header bar and dropdown), raised submenu z-index from md:z-50 to md:z-[210], added pseudo-element bridge (before:md:h-6 before:md:bottom-full) to maintain hover continuity across the gap
Mirrored dropdown gap and z-index changes from PHP into the editor TSX

Five JS improvements: (1) Refactored into closeSubmenu/openSubmenu/closeAllSubmenus helpers; (2) Fixed click-outside to close dropdown when clicking anywhere outside the specific submenu panel or its trigger button (not just outside the entire header); (3) Added Left/Right arrow keys on top-level menu buttons to move focus between menubar items; (4) Added Left/Right arrow keys inside submenus to close and move to adjacent top-level item; (5) Added Home/End keys on menubar level to jump to first/last top-level item

testPage.note: No attribute or structural changes — test page content unchanged, no update needed

fixesApplied.description: Replace left-0/right-0 with left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-(--max-container) for fixed header width constraint; raise z-index from z-150 to z-200
Dropdown gap mt-4 → mt-6; z-index z-50 → z-[210]; added before: pseudo-element bridge for hover continuity

Click-outside now checks per-dropdown (submenu panel + trigger button) instead of entire header. Full WAI-ARIA menubar keyboard pattern: Left/Right arrows on menubar, Left/Right in submenus closes and moves to adjacent item, Home/End on menubar level
